mainText: Good morning! Here's your school update for Thursday. For Harriet: A Quick Thank You to Our HHA Community. For Guinevere: 3 events today, including A Quick Thank You to Our HHA Community, Literacy Field Trip Reminders, and 2B Friday Newsletter 36. Action items needing your attention: For Virginia, bring to school: Trinity Irish Dancers!. For Guinevere, sign up / rsvp: Next Week Reminders. For Guinevere, bring to school: Literacy Field Trip Reminders. Plus 25 more. Check your calendar for details. Looking ahead this week: On Friday: A Quick Thank You to Our HHA Community, Trinity Irish Dancers!. On Saturday: Literacy Field Trip Reminders, Field Trip Information. On Sunday: Automatic Payment Reminder for Hickory Hill Academy. On Monday: 5th Grade Friday Newsletter. That's your school briefing. Have a great day!
